// PEHRA SAFETY SYSTEMS
FOR THOSEWHO NEVER STEP AWAY

Safety, assembled. One patrol at a time.

Scroll to assemble the system
01 — THE LOAD

8–15KG
EVERY NIGHT
NO SUPPORT

Railway trackmen carry the weight of the nation's railways on their backs — literally. PEHRA's biomimicry honeycomb back panel redistributes every gram, turning a crushing daily burden into a manageable carry.

02 — THE DARK

FOG. 3AM.
NO WARNING

A train can appear in seconds. PEHRA's 360° LED beacon and train alert system mean the trackman is never invisible again — seen by trains, supervisors, and rescue teams in any condition.

03 — THE FALL

IF HE FALLS
WHO KNOWS?

Fall detection and GPS SOS mean that even alone in the dark at 3 a.m., someone always knows. Help is one press away. No trackman is ever truly alone again.

LIGHTER DAYSBRIGHTER WAYS

// THE ORIGIN
THE STORY
THAT STARTED IT ALL
// HIMACHAL PRADESH · 2024 · WINTER FOG

On a foggy winter trek along railway tracks in Himachal Pradesh, one of our team members heard the rumble before they saw the light. A train. Full speed. Barely time to leap aside.

"He survived. But the trackman working those same rails every night might not be so lucky."

That moment forced us to ask: who are the people walking these tracks every night? We found them — 3 lakh railway trackmen across India, patrolling 10–15 km per shift, in fog and darkness, with almost nothing protecting them. We couldn't unsee them. So we built PEHRA.

// THE INVISIBLE CRISIS
EVERY SHIFT IS A GAMBLE
NO ONE SHOULD TAKE
🚂
No Early Train Warning

Trains emerge silently from fog at full speed. No system exists to alert a trackman in time.

🌫️
Zero Visibility in Fog

Dense winter fog blankets rail corridors. Passive reflectors are dangerously inadequate.

🎒
Crushing Physical Load

8–15 kg of tools with zero ergonomic support across 15 km. Permanent damage, quietly accepted.

📡
Delayed Hazard Reporting

Track damage reported verbally — slow, error-prone, impossible in dead zones.

🆘
No Emergency Detection

If a trackman falls at 3 a.m., there is no automatic alert. No one comes.

👟
Inadequate Footwear

No grip, no cushioning, no breathability. After 15 km, the toll on the body is profound.

// THE PEHRA SYSTEM
EIGHT PROTECTIONS
ONE WEARABLE
01
Train Alert Assistance

Real-time approaching train warnings with distance updates — seconds that save lives every patrol.

02
360° LED Visibility Beacon

Auto-activates in fog and darkness. Visible from every direction, to every eye, in every condition.

03
Honeycomb Load Distribution

Biomimicry back panel spreads 8–15 kg across the entire spine. No single point bears it alone.

04
Real-Time Image Reporting

Live images of track damage sent instantly to control centre — faster repairs, safer passengers.

05
Fall & Immobility Detection

Sensors auto-alert authorities on fall or prolonged stillness. No trackman lost in the dark.

06
Integrated GPS + SOS

One-touch emergency alert with real-time location. Help always knows exactly where to go.

07
Biomimicry Fatigue-Relief Sole

Honeycomb sole with acupressure points — 15 km of walking without 15 km of pain.

08
Insect Repellent Patch

Dense vegetation patrol made bearable. Every small detail adds up to a dignified workday.

09
High-Density Toe Protector

Breathable, impact-resistant toe cap for uneven track surfaces — comfort meets safety.

// DEVELOPMENT JOURNEY
FROM CONCEPT
TO PROTOTYPE
Month 0–2
Research & Measurement
Measured trackmen's vest and foot sizes for universal fit. Gathered raw materials — technical components, used vest, shoes, 3D printing filament.
Month 2–4
3D Design & Printing
Designed both PEHRA components in Blender. Printed honeycomb vest panel, biomimicry shoe sole, and GPS casing using FlashForge printer.
Month 4–6
Assembly & Integration
Assembled all components, integrated electronics, branded PEHRA with printed logo. Ensured no part was missed.
Month 6–8
Testing & Refinement
Tested safety, efficiency and performance. Gathered feedback for improvements. Optimized comfort and packaged for distribution.
Ongoing
Continuous Scaling
Iterating on design, expanding production, pursuing pilot deployments across high-risk rail corridors across India.
// IMPACT & ALIGNMENT
THE RIPPLE OF ONE
PROTECTED LIFE IS IMMEASURABLE

Directly improves safety for over 3 lakh railway trackmen working in hazardous conditions across India every single night.

Reduces physical strain and improves work efficiency by an estimated 20–35%, protecting long-term health and restoring worker dignity.

Enhances railway safety for millions of passengers by enabling faster hazard reporting and preventing accidents before they happen.

Supports India's Vision 2047 — every worker, regardless of role, equipped with dignity and the tools they deserve.

// UN SDGs ALIGNED
SDG 3 · Good Health
SDG 8 · Decent Work
SDG 9 · Innovation

"A nation's greatness is measured by how it treats its workers in the dark, when no one is watching."

// FUTURE ROADMAP

Enhanced cooling · Head protection · Real-time analytics · Global expansion to rail systems worldwide facing the same invisible crisis.
